sentences.arabic: يُصَلِّي أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الصُّبْحَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ قَبْلَ الشَّمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Ebu Ali klanja sabah svaki dan prije izlaska sunca.
sentences.translationEn: Abu Ali prays Fajr every day before sunrise.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ الصَّلَاةِ يَقْرَأُ شَيْئًا مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ الْكَرِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon namaza čita nešto iz Kur'ana Časnog.
sentences.translationEn: After prayer he reads something from the Noble Quran.

sentences.arabic: يَشْرَبُ كُوبًا مِنَ الشَّايِ وَيَبْدَأُ يَوْمَهُ بِهُدُوءٍ.
sentences.translation: Popije šolju čaja i mirno počne dan.
sentences.translationEn: He drinks a cup of tea and starts his day peacefully.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ: الصُّبْحُ يُعْطِينِي طَاقَةً لِيَوْمٍ جَمِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Kaže: Sabah mi daje energiju za lijep dan.
sentences.translationEn: He says: Fajr gives me energy for a beautiful day.
